category_sources: source_facts.description says deploy applications to your VPS; official GitHub README describes setting up a VPS, deploying applications, Docker Compose, Traefik, and zero-downtime deploys.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sidekick; official GitHub README and project site brand use Sidekick.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points readers to the docs and lists www.sidekickdeploy.com as the project site; README also documents launch, deploy, preview environments, and removal.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/MightyMoud/sidekick, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe a CLI for VPS setup, app deployment, Docker-based releases, and self-hosting workflows.
